title: AutoSlabs
description: Automatically generate vertical slabs for every instance of SlabBlock, without adding a single new block!
body:
# Auto Slabs
 Automatically generate vertical slabs for every instance of SlabBlock. Supports Vanilla, as well as any mod that adds Slabs.

[![AutoSlabs Showcase](https://img.youtube.com/vi/Rw6VYfrxCOs/0.jpg)](https://youtu.be/Rw6VYfrxCOs)

This mod also adds KleeSlabs functionality, so you can choose to break only half of a double slab block. Shift while breaking a double slab to break both parts of it at once.

<details>
<summary>Mixed Slabs?</summary>

Mixed slab functionality and rendering is being tracked on the [mixedslabs branch](https://github.com/Andrew6rant/Auto-Slabs/tree/mixedslabs) of my repository

[![AutoSlabs' Mixed Slabs Showcase](https://img.youtube.com/vi/gfkdt6pbWA8/0.jpg)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gfkdt6pbWA8)

</details>
